title: OCP and JTS to acquire LEAD
body: Three new investors will be listed as shareholders of PT Logindo Samudramakmur Tbk (LEAD) via debt-to-equity swap scheme.

title: Indah Kiat Pulp & Paper to issue another bond and sukuk of IDR 5.5 trillion
body: PT Indah Kiat Pulp & Paper Tbk (INKP), a pulp and paper manufacturer under Sinar Mas Group, is planning the issuance of Shelf-Registration Bond V Phase II Year 2024 and Shelf-Registration Sukuk Mudharabah IV Phase II Year 2024 with total principal worth IDR 5.5 trillion.

title: Surya Toto Indonesia to distribute interim dividend of IDR 123.84 billion
body: PT Surya Toto Indonesia Tbk (TOTO), a sanitation and kitchen appliances manufacturer, will distribute interim dividend of IDR 123.84 billion.

title: Foreign buy volume increases, net foreign volume surplus at 633.44 million shares
body: On Monday, November 11, share purchase transactions by foreign investors increased and ended at 4.53 billion shares. Foreign sales volume then totaled 3.90 billion shares, resulting in a net foreign volume surplus of 633.44 million shares.

title: Honoris Corporindo takes over 400 million Modernland Realty (MDLN) shares
body: More than 400.17 million shares of PT Modernland Realty Tbk (MDLN) were taken over from PT Panin Sekuritas Tbk by PT Honoris Corporindo Pratama on Thursday, November 7. During the transaction, Panin Sekuritas saw a share drop from 18.48% to 15.29%, while Honoris Corporindo increased its ownership from 10.17% to 13.36%. Furthermore, it seemed that Haiyanto, an individual investor in MDLN, increased his stake in this real estate development company by 9 million shares, bringing his total ownership to 9.72%.

title: OCP and JTS to acquire LEAD
body: Three new investors will be listed as shareholders of PT Logindo Samudramakmur Tbk (LEAD) via debt-to-equity swap scheme.

title: Indah Kiat Pulp & Paper to issue another bond and sukuk of IDR 5.5 trillion
body: PT Indah Kiat Pulp & Paper Tbk (INKP), a pulp and paper manufacturer under Sinar Mas Group, is planning the issuance of Shelf-Registration Bond V Phase II Year 2024 and Shelf-Registration Sukuk Mudharabah IV Phase II Year 2024 with total principal worth IDR 5.5 trillion.

title: Surya Toto Indonesia to distribute interim dividend of IDR 123.84 billion
body: PT Surya Toto Indonesia Tbk (TOTO), a sanitation and kitchen appliances manufacturer, will distribute interim dividend of IDR 123.84 billion.

title: Foreign buy volume increases, net foreign volume surplus at 633.44 million shares
body: On Monday, November 11, share purchase transactions by foreign investors increased and ended at 4.53 billion shares. Foreign sales volume then totaled 3.90 billion shares, resulting in a net foreign volume surplus of 633.44 million shares.

title: Honoris Corporindo takes over 400 million Modernland Realty (MDLN) shares
body: More than 400.17 million shares of PT Modernland Realty Tbk (MDLN) were taken over from PT Panin Sekuritas Tbk by PT Honoris Corporindo Pratama on Thursday, November 7. During the transaction, Panin Sekuritas saw a share drop from 18.48% to 15.29%, while Honoris Corporindo increased its ownership from 10.17% to 13.36%. Furthermore, it seemed that Haiyanto, an individual investor in MDLN, increased his stake in this real estate development company by 9 million shares, bringing his total ownership to 9.72%.

title: Acquired by MD Entertainment, new shareholders to rebrand NETV
body: PT MD Entertainment Tbk (FILM) is rebranding PT Net Visi Media Tbk (NETV) to PT MDTV Media Technologies Tbk (NETV), a major transformation after officially acquiring and controlling NETV.

title: Eyeing fresh funds, LPCK to set up rights issue of 3 billion shares
body: PT Lippo Cikarang Tbk (LPCK) is eyeing extra capital through rights issue of a maximum of 3 billion shares worth IDR 500 per share.

title: MNC Energy Investments to initiate rights issue of 20.19 billion shares
body: PT MNC Energy Investments Tbk (IATA) will increase capital through pre-emptive rights, also known as rights issue, through the issuance of 20.19 billion new shares.

title: Waskita Toll Road to raise portion in subsidiaries through debt conversion
body: PT Waskita Toll Road (WTR), a subsidiary of PT Waskita Karya (Persero) Tbk (WSKT), has increased its portion in PT Kresna Kusuma Dyandra Marga (KKDM).

title: WINS to grant another corporate guarantee worth USD 3.3 million for subsidiary
body: PT Wintermar Offshore Tbk (WINS) is once again giving corporate guarantee for one of its subsidiaries, PT Winpan Offshore.

title: Stock price declined drastically, BULL to push back treasury shares sale
body: PT Buana Lintas Lautan Tbk (BULL) still has yet to conclude the plan of selling its treasury shares, which were obtained from the buyback in 2020.

title: Time to Appreciate Yourself as the Hero on 11.11
Astra’s car sales up 8.7% in October 2024
body: Slipped in September, PT Astra International Tbk (ASII) reported Astra car sales increasing 8.7% month-to-month (mtm) to 43,596 units from 40,096 units recorded last September.

title: INCO and GEM Co to collaborate on net-zero nickel production
body: PT Vale Indonesia Tbk (INCO) and GEM Co Ltd, Beijing, China, have reportedly agreed upon a contract regarding investment in net-zero nickel production in Central Sulawesi.

title: KKGI to give interim stock dividend with 190:3 ratio
body: PT Resource Alam Indonesia Tbk (KKGI) will distribute interim stock dividend with the ratio of 190:3, meaning that 190 old shares will grant the owner 3 new shares.

title: Indonesia-China signed 7 strategic agreements
body: The governments of Indonesia and China have signed 7 strategic cooperation agreements at Great Hall of the People in Beijing last Tuesday (9/11).

title: Q3 2024 saw FAST’s loss worsened to IDR 557.08 billion
body: PT Fast Food Indonesia Tbk (FAST), the KFC franchise license holder, continues to record a loss in Q3 2024, worsening from the same period last year by up to 266.44% year-on-year.

title: JCI opened the week at the red zone
body: Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (JCI) sloped this morning, from 9 AM to 10 AM WIB. It recorded its lowest point yet within this past three weeks.

title: PANI maintains its exponential growth
body: Stock performance of PT Pantai Indah Kapuk Dua Tbk (PANI) has shot up by 212.55% since its rights issue on August 19, 2024.

title: Antam and Freeport to collaborate on strengthening domestic gold supply chain
body: PT Aneka Tambang Tbk (ANTM) or Antam and PT Freeport Indonesia (PTFI) have signed a sale and purchase agreement of gold with purity level of 99.99% to reinforce domestic gold supply chain.

title: SMF to issue Shelf-Registration Social Bond of IDR 1.2 trillion
body: PT Sarana Mutligriya Finansial (Persero) will issue Shelf-Registration Social Bond I Phase IV Year 2024 worth IDR 1.2 trillion.

title: Mandiri Tunas Finance to issue bond of IDR 1.61 trillion
body: PT Mandiri Tunas Finance (MTF), a subsidiary of PT Bank Mandiri (Persero) Tbk (BMRI) engaged in financing industry, is issuing Shelf-Registration Bond VI Phase IV Year 2024 with total principal of IDR 1.61 trillion.

title: TOBA to acquire Singapore company to promote waste management
body: PT TBS Energi Utama Tbk (TOBA), an issuer in the management consultancy field and a holding company, has reportedly acquired Sembcorp Environment Pte Ltd (SEPL).

title: Foreign buy falls, net foreign volume closed at -215.52 million shares
body: Foreign share purchases on Friday, November 8, fell from the previous day, totaling 3.16 billion shares. With a slight difference, the foreign sales volume was 3.38 billion shares. As a result, net foreign volume closed at -215.52 million shares. Foreign investors then began buying 1.31 billion shares of the digital corporation PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO), for a net volume of 495.60 million shares.

title: 1.4 billion Gojek Tokopedia shares sold, net foreign volume drops to -996.75 million shares
body: Foreign investors sold up to 1.40 billion shares of PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO), resulting in a net volume of -394.68 million shares. This transaction then led to an increase in foreign sales volume of 4.96 billion shares. Meanwhile, foreign buying volume was 3.97 billion shares, resulting in a net foreign volume to drop to -996.75 million.

title: KMDS to give interim dividend of IDR 15 per share
body: PT Kurniamitra Duta Sentosa Tbk (KMDS), a food and beverages (F&B) company, announces the distribution of interim dividend of IDR 15 per share, or a total of IDR 12 billion.

title: Attending Indonesia Week Hong Kong 2024, BNI Brings wondr Closer to the Indonesian Diaspora and Migrant Workers in Hong Kong
body: PT Bank Negara Indonesia (Persero) Tbk or BNI, through its mobile banking application, wondr by BNI, continues its expansion to explore major cities in the world.

title: Indonesia gov’t eyes IDR 22 trillion in next week’s SUN auction
body: The Indonesian government is once again scheduling an auction of Government Securities (SUN) next Thursday, November 14, 2024, with an indicative target of IDR 22 trillion.

title: Another 80 million shares of Bumi Resources Mineral (BRMS) purchased by Bumi Resources
body: The parent company of PT Bumi Resources Minerals Tbk (BRMS), PT Bumi Resources Tbk, acquired 80 million shares of the company on Wednesday, November 6. With the help of PT Trimegah Sekuritas Indonesia Tbk, this investor's share portion increased from 5.34% to 5.4%. BRMS is a subsidiary of Bumi Resources, which primarily operates in the mineral mining sector.

title: Busrul Iman: Banking Business Group benefits us
body: PT Bank Pembangunan Daerah (BPD) Jawa Timur Tbk (BJTM) or Bank Jatim is ready to stand as a holding bank of Banking Business Group (KUB), overseeing five regional banks.

title: Ling Sun owns 5.25 percent of Koka Indonesia (KOKA) shares after purchasing 150 million shares
body: Through PT OCBC Sekuritas Indonesia and PT Trimegah Sekuritas Indonesia Tbk, individual investor Ling Sun purchased 150.17 million shares of PT Koka Indonesia Tbk (KOKA) on Tuesday, November 5. Ling Sun has bought 5.25% of the shares in the issuer, which is a heavy construction and civil engineering firm.

title: Tera Data Indonusa to channel interim dividend of IDR 29.2 billion
body: PT Tera Data Indonusa Tbk (AXIO), a computer manufacturer and trading company, will initiate an interim dividend distribution of IDR 5 per share or IDR 29.2 billion in total.

title: Morning session saw JCI hiked to the green zone
body: Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (JCI) shifted positively at the beginning of today’s (8/11) session, following the Fed’s decision to lower the interest rate by 25 basis points (bps) yesterday (7/11) local time.

title: Great market potential, BEER to introduce new product
body: PT Jobubu Jarum Minahasa Tbk (BEER), an alcoholic beverage manufacturer, has launched a new variant of its wine, Anggur Pink (pink wine or rosé), which is believed to have an extensive market niche.

title: Slowing down inflation, the Fed lowers interest rates by 25 bps
body: Central Bank of the United States of America or the Fed announced the interest-rate cut of 25 bps to 4.5%-4.75% on Thursday (7/11).
